THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESQUER, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1874 46TH AVE, S.F, CA. $4,676.56 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,281.56, STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-1994, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. EVICTION FURTHER STAYED TO 2-20-94 IF DEF. PAYS PL. $191.65 BY 5PM, 2-2-94. NO FURTHER STAYS. DEF. REPRESENTS THERE ARE NO OTHER OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES
